title: Craftocracy Modpack
description: Modpack for Craftocracy, Minecraft's most serious and most democratic political roleplay server.
body:
# craftocracy's awesome most democratic modpack!!
this is the modpack for the craftocracy minecraft server! on craftocracy, any player can submit a proposal to add a mod to this pack, and it gets added if the legislature approves. we are minecraft's most serious political roleplay server and this modpack proves it.

**must join the discord to play on the server**

## notable mods
- create
- biomes o plenty
- serene seasons
- simple voice chat
- immersive aircrafts
- timeless and classics zero (guns)
- leashable players
